title: [ZH] 设备制造商 — 基础设施被解绑出去

description.en: Nokia Siemens Networks, Alcatel-Lucent, Ericsson. Run telco networks AS A SERVICE. Their economic engine is scale across multiple telco contracts — same engineers, same NOC, many telcos.
description.zh: 诺基亚西门子、阿尔卡特朗讯、爱立信。把电信运营商的网络当成「服务」来运营。经济发动机是「跨多家运营商合同的规模」——同一支工程团队、同一个 NOC,服务多家 telco。
